name: policy
summary: Canonical rule files fed to subagents; three policy docs (philosophy, spec-rules, coding-rules).
deprecation_criterion: when Claude Code exposes a native subagent-policy injection point
spec_no_change_reason: 1.7.2 -> 1.8.0 relocates the feature's spec from docs/spec/ to specs/ (issue #399 Phase 2). The spec/contract invariant text is unchanged; the minor bump records the canonical spec-directory layout migration and the lockstep frontmatter version bump across feature.json, specs/spec.md, and specs/contract.md.
